name: Community National Bank
description_short: Community National Bank is a regional FDIC-insured bank offering checking, savings, CDs, mortgages, and lending services across Kansas locations.
description_long: Community National Bank operates as a traditional community bank with FDIC insurance backing and multiple physical locations in Kansas, including branches in Seneca, Sabetha, Topeka, Tonganoxie, Basehor, and Overland Park. The bank positions itself as a comprehensive financial institution serving both retail and business customers with deposit products, lending services, and investment options. Their core offerings include checking and savings accounts, Certificates of Deposit (CDs), mortgage lending, and mobile banking capabilities. Community National Bank distinguishes itself through in-house loan servicing, claiming to service 98% of mortgages they originate internally rather than selling them on the secondary market. This approach allows for potentially more personalized customer relationships and streamlined servicing. The bank emphasizes modern digital capabilities with a mobile app featuring mobile deposit, alerts, and mobile wallet functionality, alongside traditional in-branch services. However, as a regional community bank, Community National Bank has limited geographic reach compared to national banks, operates only in Kansas, and provides no information about competitive product rates, fee structures, or specific lending terms on their public website. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with promotional rates
Mobile banking app with mobile deposit
Card management and controls (freeze, customize limits)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Services 98% of mortgages in-house, enabling direct customer relationships for loan servicing
Multiple physical banking centers across Kansas (6 locations listed) for in-person access
Mobile app with mobile deposit, real-time alerts, and mobile wallet capabilities
Online account opening available for savings, checking, and CD products
Card management tools allowing customers to customize limits, freeze cards, and receive notifications
CD Special offering 3.80% APY on 12-month terms (as of 1/7/2026)
cons: Geographic limitation: only operates in Kansas with no indication of expansion or online-only options for out-of-state customers
Website provides no fee schedules, minimum balance requirements, or specific APRs for loans and credit products
No information disclosed about business lending services, commercial loan terms, or SBA loan programs despite mentioning business accounts
Limited transparency on mortgage rates, terms, and APRs compared to industry standards for comparison
Website contains no details about investment services beyond CDs and mentions 'CNB Custody' without explanation of capabilities
best_for: Kansas residents seeking full-service banking with local branch access and in-person relationship banking
Mortgage borrowers who prefer in-house servicing and direct relationships with their loan servicer
Small to medium business owners in Kansas looking for relationship-based commercial banking
Conservative savers interested in FDIC-insured products like CDs and savings accounts
diagnosis: Community National Bank is best for Kansas-based customers seeking traditional community banking with FDIC insurance, multiple physical branches, and direct mortgage servicing relationships. The main caveat is geographic restriction to Kansas and lack of public pricing transparency, making rate and fee comparison difficult for prospective customers.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
